chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1488 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 12941/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 20.10.2016. Mr. Hemandas S. Sanghani, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel DSP Abdul Aleem SDPO Sakro on behalf of SSP Thatta, ASI Shah Nawaz Mangi on behalf of SHO P.S Sijawa, Inspector Abdul Khaliq Wagan on behalf of SSP Sijawal, and ASI Zulfiqar Shar on behalf of SHO P.S Sakro. -.-.-. Both the petitioners are present and confirm that they being sui juris have contracted a marriage out of their freewill and regarding which they have also placed on record an affidavit of freewill as well as nikahnama. Today, learned State Counsel has filed statement on behalf of police officials/respondents, wherein, inter alia it has been stated that neither they are providing any shelter to private respondents nor causing harassment to the petitioners. However, State Counsel states that whenever petitioners will approach the concerned SHO, he will provide the requisite protection to them. At this juncture, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that if the official respondents are undertaking to provide requisite protection to the petitioners, this petition may be disposed of on their undertaking. Order accordingly. Official respondents (police officials) are directed to provide protection to the petitioners being citizens of this Country against any unlawful illegal act on the part of private respondents which includes causing harassment in any form. Instant petition is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application.

Instant petition is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
